title: NMMBlocks Mod
description: Simple 128x texture mod for building and decorating your cities
body:
This simple mod will add 128x blocks for your cities. The mod contains mostly post-Soviet style blocks, but they will also be suitable for other cities. In addition, the mod has light models that will make it easier to build cities: fake windows, doors, cornices, etc. 

The mod is still in development, so new blocks and models will be added and existing ones will be improved.

A github page for feedback will be open soon
